_description: A pet health management app with vet appointment booking, vaccination tracking, and diet plans.
idea_normalised: A pet health companion app with vet appointment booking, vaccination and medication reminders, diet planning, and a symptom checker for dogs and cats.

brand_config.logo_concept: A paw print with a heart or medical cross overlay
brand_config.target_audience: Dog and cat owners aged 22-45 who treat pets as family members

features: Vet appointment booking with in-app video consultation
Digital health records and vet history
AI symptom checker for dogs and cats
Lost pet alert with QR code tag

pricing_tiers.name: Plus
pricing_tiers.description: Up to 3 pets, diet plans, video consults

problem: Pet owners forget vaccinations and medications, risking pet health
Finding a vet quickly in an emergency is stressful
Pet health data is scattered across paper records and emails
lean_canvas_json.solution: A single app that centralises pet health records, reminders, and vet access
lean_canvas_json.unique_value_proposition: Everything your pet needs, in one place — from vaccines to vets to diet
lean_canvas_json.unfair_advantage: AI symptom checker + local vet marketplace + digital records — competitors have only 1 of these
customer_segments: Millennial and Gen Z pet owners

personas.name: Emma
goals: Never miss a pet health milestone
